recommendations.title: Trading Places
recommendations.overview: A snobbish investor and a wily street con-artist find their positions reversed as part of a bet by two callous millionaires.

recommendations.title: The Blues Brothers
recommendations.overview: Jake Blues, just released from prison, puts his old band back together to save the Catholic home where he and his brother Elwood were raised.

recommendations.title: Animal House
recommendations.overview: At a 1962 College, Dean Vernon Wormer is determined to expel the entire Delta Tau Chi Fraternity, but those troublemakers have other plans for him.

recommendations.title: Michael Jackson's Thriller
recommendations.overview: A night at the movies turns terrifying when Michael and his date are attacked by zombies. Released at the height of Thriller’s success, the short film redefined the music video, broke racial barriers, and became the first inducted into the U.S. Natio

recommendations.title: Burke & Hare
recommendations.overview: Two 19th-century opportunists become serial killers so that they can maintain their profitable business supplying cadavers to an anatomist.

recommendations.title: Spies Like Us
recommendations.overview: Two bumbling government employees think they are U.S. spies, only to discover that they are actually decoys for nuclear war.

recommendations.title: Innocent Blood
recommendations.overview: Marie is a vampire with a thirst for bad guys. When she fails to properly dispose of one of her victims, a violent mob boss, she bites off more than she can chew and faces a new, immortal danger.

recommendations.title: ¡Three Amigos!
recommendations.overview: A trio of unemployed silent film actors are mistaken for real heroes by a small Mexican village in search of someone to stop a malevolent bandit.

recommendations.title: Coming to America
recommendations.overview: An African prince decides it’s time for him to find a princess... and his mission leads him and his most loyal friend to Queens, New York. In disguise as an impoverished immigrant, the pampered prince quickly finds himself a new job, new friends, new

recommendations.title: Into the Night
recommendations.genres: Thriller, Comedy, Action, Crime, Drama, Romance
recommendations.overview: Ed Okin used to have a boring life. He used to have trouble getting to sleep. Then one night, he met Diana. Now, Ed's having trouble staying alive.
